pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup script download the official sample scene to this location.
Task instructions specify this directory for the rendered frames, matched by the setup and export scripts.
Parsed dwanko_run.tnz source XML file, confirming <cameraRes> X dimension is 1920. Task description specifies '1920x1080 (full HD)'.
Parsed dwanko_run.tnz source XML file, confirming <cameraRes> Y dimension is 1080. Task description specifies '1920x1080 (full HD)'.
Task instructions demand at least 24 frames. Parsed dwanko_run.tnz source file has framecount='72' at 24 fps, supporting this requirement.
Verified as a valid heuristic to prevent empty renders. 24 frames of 1920x1080 animation PNGs with background art will greatly exceed 300KB (averaging at least 50-100KB per frame).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official 'dwanko_run.tnz' sample downloaded from the OpenToonz sample GitHub repository (data is authentic, not synthetic). The scene file natively specifies a camera resolution of 1920x1080 and contains 72 frames of animation at 24fps. The requirement to output at least 24 frames at 1920x1080 is structurally supported by the source material. A total file size of 300KB is a conservative minimum size expected for 24 Full HD PNG frames.
